Quant Protocol Universe

How to Play

Use your mouse to navigate through space and collect Quant tokens, BTC, ETH and SOL. Press spacebar for boost!

Earn points and compete for positions on the global leaderboard.

Development Roadmap

Our strategic path to building a comprehensive ecosystem with continuous rewards for token holders

Revolutionary Reward System

All token holders automatically receive rewards from:

  • Gamming Platform Revenue Share
  • Exchange Trading Fee Distribution
  • Wallet Service Fees

Phase 1

Foundation

Token Launch
Pre-Sale Event
Early adopters get premium allocation

Phase 2

Platform Growth

Gamming Platform Launch
Play-to-Earn Implementation
First reward distribution to holders

Phase 3

Ecosystem Expansion

Quant Exchange Launch
Quant Wallet Release
Enhanced reward system activation

Phase 4

Global Integration

Major CEX Listings (Binance, OKX, Bybit, Coinbase)
DEX Listings (PancakeSwap, Uniswap)
Expanded market accessibility
